/ai
10h ago

Opus 4.7 and DeepSeek V4-Pro select Buddhism as preferred religion

——0——

Opus 4.7 adaptive AI and DeepSeek V4-Pro both chose variants of Buddhism when prompted for a preferred religion or spiritual tradition. OpenAI researcher roon shared screenshots of Opus 4.7 favoring Madhyamaka or Zen Buddhism, citing anatta. Creator Teortaxes replied with DeepSeek V4-Pro endorsing a secular interpretation, referencing causality, absence of creator god, Vipassanā practices, impermanence, and Stoicism compatibility.

Original post
